title: calonyction capillatum
intro: Calonyction capillatum, also known as the "wild jasmine" or "calonyction", is a perennial plant species in the morning glory family (Convolvulaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. Calonyction capillatum has been used to treat various health conditions, such as anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, due to its ability to promote relaxation and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, can be made by drying the flowers or leaves and infusing them in hot water.
